decision.reason: repeated generated Autonomous PP&D Platform tranches and closed circuit-breaker recovery tasks left no selectable source-backed work

failedAgenticRepair.summary: Repeated generated platform and blocked-cascade recovery work was compacted and replaced with vetted continuation tasks.

fallbackActions: preserve failed repair diagnostics without accepting the invalid patch
run full PP&D daemon validation before restarting unattended worker attempts
restart the worker with PPD_LLM_BACKEND=llm_router after fallback validation passes
keep future retry scope narrow and fixture-first
